description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a natural wood finish and a sturdy, minimalist frame. The tabletop features a large blue desk mat that covers most of the surface, providing a protective and visually distinct workspace. On top of the desk, there is a silver laptop and a pair of blue over-ear headphones, both placed on the mat. The legs are angled and cross-braced, giving the desk a stable and contemporary appearance. The desk does not have any drawers or built-in storage, emphasizing a clean and uncluttered design. The overall look is sleek and functional, suitable for a variety of work or study environments.
description: A modern wooden desk with a blue desk mat, silver laptop, and blue headphones, featuring angled legs and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop with the laptop centered and headphones to the left, highlighting the blue desk mat.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the desk's slim profile, angled legs, and the placement of the laptop and headphones along the mat.
description_view_2: Rear view with the closed laptop and headphones on the right, showing the clean back edge and the mat's coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the headphones and laptop, with the cross-braced legs visible underneath.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the laptop and headphones placed on the blue mat, with the cross-braced legs at the sides and no obstructions in front.
